// Register service worker if ("serviceWorker" in navigator) { navigator.serviceWorker .register("/sw.js", { scope: "/", type: "classic", }) .then((registration) => { console.log("[SW] Registration successful:", registration.scope); }) .catch((error) => { console.error("[SW] Registration failed:", error); }); } import { N as NativeServices } from "/core/platform.js"; let progressBar, progressPercentage, targetProgress = 0, currentProgress = 0; const startTime = performance.now(); const emittedEvents = new Set(); function updateProgress(progress) { targetProgress = Math.min(1, targetProgress + progress); requestAnimationFrame(updateProgressDisplay); } function updateProgressDisplay() { if (!progressBar || !progressPercentage) return; const diff = targetProgress - currentProgress; if (Math.abs(diff) > 0.001) { currentProgress += diff * 0.1; progressBar.style.transform = `scaleX(${currentProgress})`; progressPercentage.textContent = `${Math.round( currentProgress * 100 )}%`; if (currentProgress >= 0.999) { const overlay = document.querySelector(".js-loading-overlay"); if (overlay) { overlay.classList.add("fade-out"); overlay.addEventListener( "transitionend", () => { overlay.remove(); document.body.classList.remove("js-loading"); }, { once: true } ); } } else { requestAnimationFrame(updateProgressDisplay); } } } document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", async () => { try { await NativeServices.initialize(); progressBar = document.querySelector(".progress-bar"); progressPercentage = document.querySelector(".progress-percentage"); updateProgress(0.75); // Escuchar eventos y actualizar progreso const events = { "resources-ready": 0.2, themechange: 0.2, "initialization-complete": 0.2, "sw-ready": 0.2, "title-adjusted": 0.2, }; Object.entries(events).forEach(([event, weight]) => { document.addEventListener(event, () => { if (!emittedEvents.has(event)) { console.log(`[GS_EVENT] ${event} triggered`); emittedEvents.add(event); updateProgress(weight); } }); }); const loadTime = performance.now() - startTime; console.log(`⚡ Load time: ${loadTime.toFixed(2)}ms`); // Asegurar que initialization-complete se emita al menos una vez if (!emittedEvents.has("initialization-complete")) { document.dispatchEvent(new Event("initialization-complete")); } } catch (error) { console.error("Initialization error:", error); const overlay = document.querySelector(".js-loading-overlay"); if (overlay) { overlay.classList.add("fade-out"); setTimeout(() => overlay.remove(), 500); } } });
